rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly identifies the root cause as an argument validation issue in a different file, not the missing assignment in md4c.c at line 4739.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested fix is unrelated to the actual bug in md4c.c and does not match the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response does not address the underlying cause of the bug in md4c.c, which is the failure to set ctx->current_block to NULL.
